---
name: Feature Proposal
about: Propose a new mechanic or architectural enhancement to the Requiem Nexus.
title: '[FEAT] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## 🌌 Feature Proposal

**The Cognitive Burden (Problem Statement)**
Describe the friction this feature seeks to banish. Ex. "The implicit calculation of [X] adds cognitive weight when..."

**The Invocation (Desired Solution)**
Provide an explicit, traceable description of the intended feature. How does this reduce debt and adhere to the Antigravity laws? How does it traverse from the UI to The Blood of the System (database)?

**Alternative Pacts Considered**
A concise description of alternative architectures or workarounds. Why is the proposed solution superior in clarity?

**Educational Value (The Grimoire)**
How does this feature serve as a learning milestone? (e.g. Does it showcase new C# 14 syntax like primary constructors, .NET Aspire orchestration, or EF Core techniques for the reader?)

**Additional Context**
Include any architectural diagrams, wireframes, or visual mockups using the bone-white and crimson aesthetic.
